scored_signals.signal: Microsoft: AI is an operating model shift, not a technology upgrade
scored_signals.rationale: Core to Robyn's thesis that innovation fails from execution, not ideas. The operating-model framing directly mirrors her 'corporate antibodies' concept — the immune system isn't rejecting AI, it's rejecting the organizational change AI demands.

scored_signals.signal: Intel R&D leader turns Legal and Finance from innovation blockers into backers
scored_signals.rationale: This IS Robyn's work. Corporate antibodies reframed as allies. The Intel case proves her thesis that the solution isn't to circumvent antibodies but to inoculate them with innovation's purpose.

scored_signals.signal: Innovation portfolio management: balancing Explore vs Exploit without killing growth
scored_signals.rationale: Portfolio management as continuous governance maps directly to Robyn's innovation portfolio management framework. The VC-funnel metaphor for EXPLORE stage-gates will resonate deeply.

scored_signals.signal: AI-discovered drugs showing 80-90% Phase 1 success rates
scored_signals.rationale: Blind spot collision: pharma's AI success rate revolution is the most concrete evidence that AI isn't just a tool — it's a fundamentally different innovation methodology. The phase-gate analogy to innovation portfolio management is explosive.

scored_signals.signal: Defense tech startups raised $49.1B — from invention to manufacturing at scale
scored_signals.rationale: Blind spot: Defense tech's pivot from invention to execution/manufacturing at scale perfectly mirrors the corporate innovation challenge Robyn fights daily. If Anduril can cross the valley of death, why can't your innovation lab?

scored_signals.signal: Agentic AI market to reach $45B by 2030, 74% of companies planning deployment
scored_signals.rationale: Agentic AI represents the next corporate antibody test — autonomous agents that make decisions without human gatekeepers. How organizations handle this will separate innovation theater from real transformation.

scored_signals.signal: Corporate strategy redefined: every major decision treated as a dynamic bet
scored_signals.rationale: Strategy-as-bet framing aligns with Robyn's portfolio approach. Permanent disruption means innovation isn't a department — it's the operating system.

scored_signals.signal: IMF: War darkens global economic outlook, tariffs at WWII highs
scored_signals.rationale: Geopolitical blind spot: trade fragmentation constraining innovation diffusion. When tariffs reshape supply chains, they reshape who can innovate and how fast — a constraint Robyn's clients must navigate.

scored_signals.signal: Nondisruptive creation: new markets beyond existing industry boundaries
scored_signals.rationale: Direct challenge to Christensen's disruption orthodoxy that Robyn knows deeply. Nondisruptive creation offers a third path — growth without displacement — that changes the innovation mandate.

scored_signals.signal: CAR-T therapies achieve durable remission in autoimmune diseases
scored_signals.rationale: Blind spot: 'Resetting the immune system' is the most perfect metaphor for what Robyn does with corporate antibodies. CAR-T crossing from cancer to autoimmune = innovation frameworks crossing from tech to healthcare.

scored_signals.signal: Strategic foresight becomes a formal discipline — weak signal tracking
scored_signals.rationale: Foresight formalization validates the entire Taster concept and Robyn's work in helping orgs see around corners. When foresight becomes standardized, the question shifts: who owns it?

scored_signals.signal: Energy storage outpaces all segments — Sungrow reports 128% YoY growth
scored_signals.rationale: Blind spot: Energy storage's breakout illustrates how infrastructure shifts create market creation moments. Storage isn't just a product — it's a platform that enables entirely new energy business models.
